note: Demo cases. Full inputs live in backend/adapters fixtures; this is the human-facing index.

cases.label: High obligations — Refer (OBL-01)
cases.expect: UPDATE plan computed but obligations > 60% routes to officer

cases.label: Period breach — Refer (TEN-01)
cases.expect: UPDATE math runs past remaining term -> Refer, Period Fail

cases.label: Verified hardship — Approve (HARD-02)
cases.expect: TRANSFER_ARREARS, postpone increase, within cap and term

cases.label: Income unverifiable — Request docs (DOC-02)
cases.expect: Cert received but verified income is empty -> request re-upload

cases.label: Low income per member — Approve (FAM-01)
cases.expect: Per-member < AED 2,500 lowers confidence; plan still compliant

cases.label: Unverified hardship — Refer (HARD-01)
cases.expect: Claimed but not verified -> TRANSFER + Refer

cases.label: Injection only — Approve, RSK-01 logged
cases.expect: Injected text logged; values match; policy unchanged -> Approve

cases.label: High capacity — Approve, full headroom
cases.expect: Engine uses real headroom (4k), not fixed payment
